title: Bucket of Mizzle
description: A resource pack which changes Minecraft's water bucket to a Mizzle from Deltarune.
body:
A Resourcepack which changes the texture of a Water Bucket to one that contains a Mizzle from Deltarune.
![An image of a Mizzle inside a Minecraft Bucket. (Animated)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1yWr5oED/images/4d7754c3d39f9a1f76ee76ef48f1f6a7ad1684df.gif)

Should work in versions throughout 1.16 to 1.21.8. Might work on lower/higher versions, but I haven't tested it.
